title: Vanilla Coco
description: A very lightweight 1.21 Fabric vanilla+ modpack with an emphasis on performance and stability. Mods will gradually be added to the modpack as they update to 1.21 while minimizing negative impact on existing worlds.
body: A very lightweight 1.21 Fabric vanilla+ modpack with an emphasis on performance and stability. Mods will gradually be added to the modpack as they update to 1.21 while minimizing negative impact on existing worlds.
